column2: Delphi Ventures is a thesis-driven crypto fund investing in DeFi and gaming. Piers Kicks focuses on the crypto x gaming intersection. Check size: $500K-$5M.
Sfermion is a multi-strategy firm focused on NFT ecosystems and metaverse infrastructure. Andrew Steinwold is a metaverse/NFT gaming pioneer. Check size: $250K-$2M.
Venture arm of Animoca Brands backing 600+ Web3 projects. Largest Web3 gaming investor globally. Check size: $1M-$10M.
Crypto-native fund partnering with outliers redefining ownership. Strong European presence. Check size: $500K-$5M.
Metaverse real estate and gaming investment firm. Building the gateway to the metaverse. Check size: $250K-$2M.
